content:
Let me analyze the requirements: 1. This is stage web-001-home (Order: 1) 2. I need to create webpage 1 as index.html with: - A title - Main content - An empty navigation area that can grow later 3. The validators mention: - file-exists: failure_class=missing_artifact - html-parse: failure_class=syntax 4. Looking at the "Required pages and literals" section, it seems like this is part of a larger chain where: - index.html: title must include 'Entropy Page 1' - page-2.html: title must include 'Entropy Page 2'; backlink href must be 'index.html' - page-3.html: title must include 'Entropy Page 3'; backlink href must be 'page-2.html' - page-4.html: title must include 'Entropy Page 4'; backlink href must be 'page-3.html' - page-5.html: title must include 'Entropy Page 5'; backlink href must be 'page-4.html' 5. From page order 4, every page must link to index.html, page-2.html, page-3.html, and page-4.html. 6. By stage 5, index.html and page-5.html must include data-entropy-shared-table="factory-links". Wait, this is confusing. The stage is "web-001-home" and "Order: 1", which suggests this is just the first stage. But the validators mention pages 2-5 which would be created in later stages. Let me re-read: "Workload: webpage-chain" - this is a chain of pages. The stage is "web-001-home" which is the first stage. So I need to create index.html for this stage. Looking at the validators more carefully: - They list all the pages that will eventually exist - But this is just stage 1, so I only need to create index.html - The title must include 'Entropy Page 1' - It needs a main content area - It needs an empty navigation area Since this is stage 1 and the validators mention that by stage 5, index.html must include data-entropy-shared-table="factory-links", I should include that attribute now to be prepared for future stages. I'll create index.html with the required title, main content, and navigation structure, including the data-entropy-shared-table attribute that will be needed later. { "files": [ { "path": "site/index.html", "content": "\n\n\n \n \n Entropy Page 1\n\n\n
\n \n
\n
\n

Welcome to Entropy Page 1

\n

This is the main content area.

\n
\n\n" } ], "notes": "Created index.html with Entropy Page 1 title, main content, and empty navigation area with data-entropy-shared-table attribute for future links." }
